sn35.161:1.1: On one occasion the Blessed One was dwelling at Rājagaha in Jīvaka's Mango Grove. There he addressed the bhikkhus thus:
sn35.161:1.2: "Bhikkhus, make an exertion in seclusion. When a bhikkhu is secluded, things become manifest to him as they really are. And what becomes manifest to him as it really is?"
sn35.161:1.3: All as in preceding sutta. sn.iv.145
